title: Scourge (unit)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Scourge}}
A '''scourge''' or '''assault company''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] military unit of [[Warrior caste|warriors]] that was the equivalent of a [[Company/Legends|company]]. [[Ro'ik chuun m'arh|Frigate analogs]] only carried three.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
